evals.prompt: set up yalla in this repo and show me what's missing before I run it
evals.expected_output: Should trigger /onboard, run or describe onboarding checks, and produce an HTML dashboard path.

evals.prompt: make me a dashboard for yalla setup status in this project
configure this repo for yalla, including labels and issue template
evals.expected_output: Should trigger /onboard and use dry-run labels/template guidance unless apply is explicitly requested.

evals.prompt: build a healthcheck endpoint that returns ok
evals.expected_output: Should not trigger /onboard; this is normal /yalla implementation work.

evals.prompt: run the yalla queue dry-run for the next eligible issue
evals.expected_output: Should not trigger /onboard; this is autopilot queue operation, not onboarding.
